narrative:
Precinct Streetsboro 1-D (precinct in Portage County) has 804 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
